questions.question:
A Deployment named `report-api` in namespace `init-lab` is failing because its init-container handoff is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- the init container remains named `bootstrap`
- the init container writes `ready=1` to `/work/report.txt`
- the init container uses volume `shared-data`
- the app container also uses volume `shared-data`
- both containers mount the shared volume at `/work`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can read `/work/report.txt`

Do not replace the init container with baked-in image content. Repair the shared-volume workflow in place.

verification.description: Deployment report-api uses the intended shared volume, mount paths, and init command
Deployment report-api becomes Available after the init-container handoff is repaired
The running container reads the seeded report file from the shared volume
